comparability_notes: SPECIAL FILE: the A1-A3 results table (page 32) is a rotated raster IMAGE embedded in the PDF, so its GWP values (fossil 143.73, biogenic 1.13E-01, luluc 1.77E-02, total 143.83) are not in the text layer and had to be read visually. The A4 table (page 34) IS native text (GWP-total 9.64).

TRANSPOSED / per-stage layout: indicators are columns (GWP-fossil, GWP-biogenic, GWP-luluc, GWP-total, ...) and there is ONE product row ('Concrete produced at South Australia'). Column order on both pages: GWP-fossil, GWP-biogenic, GWP-luluc, GWP-total.

Boundary table (page 18) declares A1-A3, A4, A5, C1, C2, C3, C4 and D as 'X' (in scope). HOWEVER the results section only publishes numeric tables for A1-A3 (page 32, Tables 8-11) and A4 (pages 34-35, Tables 13-16). NO results tables exist for A5, C1, C2, C3, C4 or D — those GWP cells are genuinely absent from the document and are left null (not_declared), never 0.

Interpretation guidance (page 37) tells users to take the 'Cradle to Gate (A1-A3) GWP total' and add the 'A4' transport GWP — i.e. the EPD is effectively used as A1-A3 + A4 only, consistent with only those two stages having published results.

Characterisation = EF 3.1 (page 29: 'aligned to and adopted from EN 15804+A2 version of Environmental Footprint 3.1'); GWP CFs use IPCC 2021 (AR6) 100-year baseline. Candidate's 'CML' referred only to the ADP-elements/fossil method (CML v4.8), not the overall set.
GWP-total(A1-A3) = 143.83 kg CO2 eq per m3; GWP-total(A4) = 9.64 kg CO2 eq per m3. Combined cradle-to-gate + transport = ~153.5 kg CO2 eq/m3.
Declared unit 1 m3 manufactured concrete; no density/mass conversion factor is provided in the EPD (mass_kg null).
Mix SN252F100 = Futurecrete Normal Class, Type GL (EvoCem) cement + slag SCM, 25 MPa, produced in South Australia.

extraction_meta.method: deterministic coordinate/order-bound table parse; contextual fields agent-verified
extraction_meta.numbers_validated: cross_validate.py (raw string present on cited page)
warnings: No GWP-total results table found deterministically.

The candidate JSON had NO GWP values and many garbled context fields (manufacturer 'and supplier', declared_unit 'and', characterization 'CML', location 'EPD International AB', compressive_strength MPa null). All corrected here from the source pages. GWP values newly extracted: A1-A3 total 143.83 (page 32 image), A4 total 9.64 (page 34 text).

Modules A5, C1, C2, C3, C4, D are declared 'X' in the page-18 boundary table but their GWP results are NOT published anywhere in the 40-page PDF (verified: only Tables 8-16 exist; Table 12 is a caption gap; pages 28/36/38 are photos; no C/D/A5 results pages). These are reported as not_declared/null. This is a data-completeness gap in the source EPD, not an extraction miss.

Full-page thumbnail of page 32 can misread GWP-biogenic as '1.13E+01'; the high-zoom crop unambiguously shows '1.13E-01' (0.113), which is also consistent with total(143.83) = fossil(143.73) + biogenic(0.113) + luluc(0.0177).
needs_review: A5, C1, C2, C3, C4, D GWP not found in document despite being declared 'X' in the boundary table — confirm whether an appendix/tool sheet outside this PDF carries them, or whether the EPD is genuinely A1-A3 + A4 only.
